(2) 需要在多维表格中新增、查询、修改、删除记录（行数据）
(3) 需要管理字段（列）、视图、数据表
(4) 用户提到"多维表格"、"bitable"、"数据表"、"记录"、"字段"
(5) 需要批量导入数据或批量更新多维表格

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-calendar
resolvedSkills.description: 飞书日历与日程管理工具集。包含日历管理、日程管理、参会人管理、忙闲查询。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-channel-rules
resolvedSkills.description: Lark/Feishu channel output rules. Always active in Lark conversations.

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-create-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 创建飞书云文档。从 Lark-flavored Markdown 内容创建新的飞书云文档，支持指定创建位置（文件夹/知识库/知识空间）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-fetch-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 获取飞书云文档内容。返回文档的 Markdown 内容，支持处理文档中的图片、文件和画板（需配合 feishu_doc_media 工具）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-im-read
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书 IM 消息读取工具使用指南，覆盖会话消息获取、话题回复读取、跨会话消息搜索、图片/文件资源下载。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要获取群聊或单聊的历史消息
(2) 需要读取话题（thread）内的回复消息
(3) 需要跨会话搜索消息（按关键词、发送者、时间等条件）
(4) 消息中包含图片、文件、音频、视频，需要下载
(5) 用户提到"聊天记录"、"消息"、"群里说了什么"、"话题回复"、"搜索消息"、"图片"、"文件下载"
(6) 需要按时间范围过滤消息、分页获取更多消息

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-task
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书任务管理工具,用于创建、查询、更新任务和清单。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要创建、查询、更新任务
(2) 需要创建、管理任务清单
(3) 需要查看任务列表或清单内的任务
(4) 用户提到"任务"、"待办"、"to-do"、"清单"、"task"
(5) 需要设置任务负责人、关注人、截止时间

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-troubleshoot
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书插件问题排查工具。包含常见问题 FAQ 和深度诊断命令（/feishu_doctor）。

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-update-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 更新飞书云文档。支持 7 种更新模式：追加、覆盖、定位替换、全文替换、前/后插入、删除。

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".

resolvedSkills.name: tmux
resolvedSkills.description: Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.

resolvedSkills.name: weather
resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: clawsec-suite
resolvedSkills.description: ClawSec 安全套件 - 恶意技能监控、加密签名验证、审批门控响应。全局安全技能。

resolvedSkills.name: context-engineering
resolvedSkills.description: AI Agent 上下文工程技能。当需要管理 AI Agent 的上下文状态、优化 Token 使用、设计多 Agent 协作、处理长周期任务时使用此技能。基于 Anthropic 最佳实践。

resolvedSkills.name: core-principles
resolvedSkills.description: 核心原则技能 - 隐私保护 + 实事求是。全局最高优先级，所有 Session 和 Agent 必须遵守。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-global-operations
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书全局操作技能（最高优先级）。包含 Token 内存存储机制、云盘操作、文档创建等核心功能。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要操作飞书云盘（创建文件夹/上传下载文件）
(2) 需要创建/编辑/读取飞书云文档
(3) 需要管理飞书日历、任务、多维表格
(4) 用户提到"飞书"、"云盘"、"云文档"、"飞书文档"

**核心原则**: Token 内存存储，用户隔离，Gateway 重启后需重新授权

resolvedSkills.name: find-skills
resolvedSkills.description: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.

resolvedSkills.name: memory-recall
resolvedSkills.description: 基于钩子（hooks）的记忆检索系统，允许通过关键词触发快速回忆相关记忆。全局记忆技能。

resolvedSkills.name: multi-search-engine
resolvedSkills.description: 17 个搜索引擎集成，无需 API key 即可进行网络搜索。支持国内 8 个引擎和国际 9 个引擎，内置自动代理访问国外网站。

resolvedSkills.name: opencode-integration
resolvedSkills.description: OpenCode 集成技能。使用 OpenCode 进行代码生成、项目管理和 AI 编码任务。支持 Plan/Build 工作流、会话管理、模型选择。

resolvedSkills.name: self-evolution
resolvedSkills.description: 自我进化技能，用于 AI 助手的持续学习和能力提升。利用外网访问优势，学习最新技术，增强现有能力，创建新技能。全局进化技能。

resolvedSkills.name: self-improving
resolvedSkills.description: Self-Improving + Proactive Agent — Global Skill. 从用户纠正和自我反思中学习，知识随时间累积，桥接原生记忆系统。

resolvedSkills.name: automation-workflow
resolvedSkills.description: 自动化工作流技能，用于创建和管理自动化任务流程。

resolvedSkills.description: 创建飞书云文档。从 Lark-flavored Markdown 内容创建新的飞书云文档，支持指定创建位置（文件夹/知识库/知识空间）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-fetch-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 获取飞书云文档内容。返回文档的 Markdown 内容，支持处理文档中的图片、文件和画板（需配合 feishu_doc_media 工具）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-im-read
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书 IM 消息读取工具使用指南，覆盖会话消息获取、话题回复读取、跨会话消息搜索、图片/文件资源下载。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要获取群聊或单聊的历史消息
(2) 需要读取话题（thread）内的回复消息
(3) 需要跨会话搜索消息（按关键词、发送者、时间等条件）
(4) 消息中包含图片、文件、音频、视频，需要下载
(5) 用户提到"聊天记录"、"消息"、"群里说了什么"、"话题回复"、"搜索消息"、"图片"、"文件下载"
(6) 需要按时间范围过滤消息、分页获取更多消息

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-task
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书任务管理工具,用于创建、查询、更新任务和清单。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要创建、查询、更新任务
(2) 需要创建、管理任务清单
(3) 需要查看任务列表或清单内的任务
(4) 用户提到"任务"、"待办"、"to-do"、"清单"、"task"
(5) 需要设置任务负责人、关注人、截止时间

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-troubleshoot
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书插件问题排查工具。包含常见问题 FAQ 和深度诊断命令（/feishu_doctor）。

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-update-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 更新飞书云文档。支持 7 种更新模式：追加、覆盖、定位替换、全文替换、前/后插入、删除。

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".

resolvedSkills.name: tmux
resolvedSkills.description: Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.

resolvedSkills.name: weather
resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: clawsec-suite
resolvedSkills.description: ClawSec 安全套件 - 恶意技能监控、加密签名验证、审批门控响应。全局安全技能。

resolvedSkills.name: context-engineering
resolvedSkills.description: AI Agent 上下文工程技能。当需要管理 AI Agent 的上下文状态、优化 Token 使用、设计多 Agent 协作、处理长周期任务时使用此技能。基于 Anthropic 最佳实践。

resolvedSkills.name: core-principles
resolvedSkills.description: 核心原则技能 - 隐私保护 + 实事求是。全局最高优先级，所有 Session 和 Agent 必须遵守。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-global-operations
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书全局操作技能（最高优先级）。包含 Token 内存存储机制、云盘操作、文档创建等核心功能。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要操作飞书云盘（创建文件夹/上传下载文件）
(2) 需要创建/编辑/读取飞书云文档
(3) 需要管理飞书日历、任务、多维表格
(4) 用户提到"飞书"、"云盘"、"云文档"、"飞书文档"

**核心原则**: Token 内存存储，用户隔离，Gateway 重启后需重新授权

resolvedSkills.name: find-skills
resolvedSkills.description: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.

resolvedSkills.name: memory-recall
resolvedSkills.description: 基于钩子（hooks）的记忆检索系统，允许通过关键词触发快速回忆相关记忆。全局记忆技能。

resolvedSkills.name: multi-search-engine
resolvedSkills.description: 17 个搜索引擎集成，无需 API key 即可进行网络搜索。支持国内 8 个引擎和国际 9 个引擎，内置自动代理访问国外网站。

resolvedSkills.name: opencode-integration
resolvedSkills.description: OpenCode 集成技能。使用 OpenCode 进行代码生成、项目管理和 AI 编码任务。支持 Plan/Build 工作流、会话管理、模型选择。

resolvedSkills.name: self-evolution
resolvedSkills.description: 自我进化技能，用于 AI 助手的持续学习和能力提升。利用外网访问优势，学习最新技术，增强现有能力，创建新技能。全局进化技能。

resolvedSkills.name: self-improving
resolvedSkills.description: Self-Improving + Proactive Agent — Global Skill. 从用户纠正和自我反思中学习，知识随时间累积，桥接原生记忆系统。

resolvedSkills.name: automation-workflow
resolvedSkills.description: 自动化工作流技能，用于创建和管理自动化任务流程。

agent:main:cron:7eb7d21f-b3fe-443a-9d6d-.lastHeartbeatText:
已记录股票分析师报告的情况。

**问题发现**: QQ定时提醒的配置存在问题 - `chat_id` 为 "heartbeat" 而非有效的QQ目标格式（应为 `qqbot:c2c:openid` 或 `qqbot:group:groupid`）。

我已成功生成了完整的市场汇总报告，但无法发送到QQ。需要确认正确的QQ用户/群组ID才能发送。已将问题记录到今日记忆文件中。

resolvedSkills.name: qqbot-channel
resolvedSkills.description: QQ 频道管理技能。查询频道列表、子频道、成员、发帖、公告、日程等操作。使用 qqbot_channel_api 工具代理 QQ 开放平台 HTTP 接口，自动处理 Token 鉴权。当用户需要查看频道、管理子频道、查询成员、发布帖子/公告/日程时使用此技能。

resolvedSkills.name: qqbot-media
resolvedSkills.description: QQBot 富媒体收发能力。使用 <qqmedia> 标签，系统根据文件扩展名自动识别类型（图片/语音/视频/文件）。

resolvedSkills.name: qqbot-remind
resolvedSkills.description: QQBot 定时提醒。支持一次性和周期性提醒的创建、查询、取消。当通过 QQ 通道通信且涉及提醒/定时任务时使用。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-bitable
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书多维表格（Bitable）的创建、查询、编辑和管理工具。包含 27 种字段类型支持、高级筛选、批量操作和视图管理。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要创建或管理飞书多维表格 App
(2) 需要在多维表格中新增、查询、修改、删除记录（行数据）
(3) 需要管理字段（列）、视图、数据表
(4) 用户提到"多维表格"、"bitable"、"数据表"、"记录"、"字段"
(5) 需要批量导入数据或批量更新多维表格

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-calendar
resolvedSkills.description: 飞书日历与日程管理工具集。包含日历管理、日程管理、参会人管理、忙闲查询。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-channel-rules
resolvedSkills.description: Lark/Feishu channel output rules. Always active in Lark conversations.

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-create-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 创建飞书云文档。从 Lark-flavored Markdown 内容创建新的飞书云文档，支持指定创建位置（文件夹/知识库/知识空间）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-fetch-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 获取飞书云文档内容。返回文档的 Markdown 内容，支持处理文档中的图片、文件和画板（需配合 feishu_doc_media 工具）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-im-read
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书 IM 消息读取工具使用指南，覆盖会话消息获取、话题回复读取、跨会话消息搜索、图片/文件资源下载。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要获取群聊或单聊的历史消息
(2) 需要读取话题（thread）内的回复消息
(3) 需要跨会话搜索消息（按关键词、发送者、时间等条件）
(4) 消息中包含图片、文件、音频、视频，需要下载
(5) 用户提到"聊天记录"、"消息"、"群里说了什么"、"话题回复"、"搜索消息"、"图片"、"文件下载"
(6) 需要按时间范围过滤消息、分页获取更多消息

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-task
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书任务管理工具,用于创建、查询、更新任务和清单。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要创建、查询、更新任务
(2) 需要创建、管理任务清单
(3) 需要查看任务列表或清单内的任务
(4) 用户提到"任务"、"待办"、"to-do"、"清单"、"task"
(5) 需要设置任务负责人、关注人、截止时间

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-troubleshoot
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书插件问题排查工具。包含常见问题 FAQ 和深度诊断命令（/feishu_doctor）。

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-update-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 更新飞书云文档。支持 7 种更新模式：追加、覆盖、定位替换、全文替换、前/后插入、删除。

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".

resolvedSkills.name: tmux
resolvedSkills.description: Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.

resolvedSkills.name: weather
resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: claude-code-architecture
resolvedSkills.description: Claude Code 架构优化技能。基于 Claude Code 泄露源码的深度分析，提取核心架构设计模式和最佳实践，用于优化 OpenClaw 系统。全局技能。

resolvedSkills.name: clawsec-suite
resolvedSkills.description: ClawSec 安全套件 - 恶意技能监控、加密签名验证、审批门控响应。全局安全技能。

resolvedSkills.name: context-engineering
resolvedSkills.description: AI Agent 上下文工程技能。当需要管理 AI Agent 的上下文状态、优化 Token 使用、设计多 Agent 协作、处理长周期任务时使用此技能。基于 Anthropic 最佳实践。全局技能。

resolvedSkills.name: core-principles
resolvedSkills.description: 核心原则技能 - 隐私保护 + 实事求是。全局最高优先级，所有 Session 和 Agent 必须遵守。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-global-operations
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书全局操作技能（最高优先级）。包含 Token 内存存储机制、云盘操作、文档创建等核心功能。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要操作飞书云盘（创建文件夹/上传下载文件）
(2) 需要创建/编辑/读取飞书云文档
(3) 需要管理飞书日历、任务、多维表格
(4) 用户提到"飞书"、"云盘"、"云文档"、"飞书文档"

**核心原则**: Token 内存存储，用户隔离，Gateway 重启后需重新授权

resolvedSkills.name: find-skills
resolvedSkills.description: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.

resolvedSkills.name: memory-recall
resolvedSkills.description: 基于钩子（hooks）的记忆检索系统，允许通过关键词触发快速回忆相关记忆。全局记忆技能。

resolvedSkills.name: memory-truncation
resolvedSkills.description: Memory 硬截断保护技能。防止 MEMORY.md 文件溢出导致 token 超限，确保 Memory 系统稳定运行。全局技能。

resolvedSkills.name: multi-search-engine
resolvedSkills.description: 17 个搜索引擎集成，无需 API key 即可进行网络搜索。支持国内 8 个引擎和国际 9 个引擎，内置自动代理访问国外网站。OpenClaw 全局唯一允许的搜索工具。

resolvedSkills.name: opencode-integration
resolvedSkills.description: OpenCode 集成技能。使用 OpenCode 进行代码生成、项目管理和 AI 编码任务。支持 Plan/Build 工作流、会话管理、模型选择。

resolvedSkills.name: self-evolution
resolvedSkills.description: 自我进化技能，用于 AI 助手的持续学习和能力提升。利用外网访问优势，学习最新技术，增强现有能力，创建新技能。全局进化技能。

resolvedSkills.name: self-improving
resolvedSkills.description: Self-Improving + Proactive Agent — Global Skill. 从用户纠正和自我反思中学习，知识随时间累积，桥接原生记忆系统。

skillsSnapshot.prompt:

Use the read tool to load a skill's file when the task matches its description.
When a skill file references a relative path, resolve it against the skill directory (parent of SKILL.md / dirname of the path) and use that absolute path in tool commands.

resolvedSkills.name: qqbot-channel
resolvedSkills.description: QQ 频道管理技能。查询频道列表、子频道、成员、发帖、公告、日程等操作。使用 qqbot_channel_api 工具代理 QQ 开放平台 HTTP 接口，自动处理 Token 鉴权。当用户需要查看频道、管理子频道、查询成员、发布帖子/公告/日程时使用此技能。

resolvedSkills.name: qqbot-media
resolvedSkills.description: QQBot 富媒体收发能力。使用 <qqmedia> 标签，系统根据文件扩展名自动识别类型（图片/语音/视频/文件）。

resolvedSkills.name: qqbot-remind
resolvedSkills.description: QQBot 定时提醒。支持一次性和周期性提醒的创建、查询、取消。当通过 QQ 通道通信且涉及提醒/定时任务时使用。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-bitable
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书多维表格（Bitable）的创建、查询、编辑和管理工具。包含 27 种字段类型支持、高级筛选、批量操作和视图管理。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要创建或管理飞书多维表格 App
(2) 需要在多维表格中新增、查询、修改、删除记录（行数据）
(3) 需要管理字段（列）、视图、数据表
(4) 用户提到"多维表格"、"bitable"、"数据表"、"记录"、"字段"
(5) 需要批量导入数据或批量更新多维表格

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-calendar
resolvedSkills.description: 飞书日历与日程管理工具集。包含日历管理、日程管理、参会人管理、忙闲查询。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-channel-rules
resolvedSkills.description: Lark/Feishu channel output rules. Always active in Lark conversations.

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-create-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 创建飞书云文档。从 Lark-flavored Markdown 内容创建新的飞书云文档，支持指定创建位置（文件夹/知识库/知识空间）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-fetch-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 获取飞书云文档内容。返回文档的 Markdown 内容，支持处理文档中的图片、文件和画板（需配合 feishu_doc_media 工具）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-im-read
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书 IM 消息读取工具使用指南，覆盖会话消息获取、话题回复读取、跨会话消息搜索、图片/文件资源下载。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要获取群聊或单聊的历史消息
(2) 需要读取话题（thread）内的回复消息
(3) 需要跨会话搜索消息（按关键词、发送者、时间等条件）
(4) 消息中包含图片、文件、音频、视频，需要下载
(5) 用户提到"聊天记录"、"消息"、"群里说了什么"、"话题回复"、"搜索消息"、"图片"、"文件下载"
(6) 需要按时间范围过滤消息、分页获取更多消息

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-task
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书任务管理工具,用于创建、查询、更新任务和清单。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要创建、查询、更新任务
(2) 需要创建、管理任务清单
(3) 需要查看任务列表或清单内的任务
(4) 用户提到"任务"、"待办"、"to-do"、"清单"、"task"
(5) 需要设置任务负责人、关注人、截止时间

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-troubleshoot
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书插件问题排查工具。包含常见问题 FAQ 和深度诊断命令（/feishu_doctor）。

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-update-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 更新飞书云文档。支持 7 种更新模式：追加、覆盖、定位替换、全文替换、前/后插入、删除。

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".

resolvedSkills.name: tmux
resolvedSkills.description: Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.

resolvedSkills.name: weather
resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: claude-code-architecture
resolvedSkills.description: Claude Code 架构优化技能。基于 Claude Code 泄露源码的深度分析，提取核心架构设计模式和最佳实践，用于优化 OpenClaw 系统。全局技能。

resolvedSkills.name: clawsec-suite
resolvedSkills.description: ClawSec 安全套件 - 恶意技能监控、加密签名验证、审批门控响应。全局安全技能。

resolvedSkills.name: context-engineering
resolvedSkills.description: AI Agent 上下文工程技能。当需要管理 AI Agent 的上下文状态、优化 Token 使用、设计多 Agent 协作、处理长周期任务时使用此技能。基于 Anthropic 最佳实践。全局技能。

resolvedSkills.name: core-principles
resolvedSkills.description: 核心原则技能 - 隐私保护 + 实事求是。全局最高优先级，所有 Session 和 Agent 必须遵守。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-global-operations
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书全局操作技能（最高优先级）。包含 Token 内存存储机制、云盘操作、文档创建等核心功能。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要操作飞书云盘（创建文件夹/上传下载文件）
(2) 需要创建/编辑/读取飞书云文档
(3) 需要管理飞书日历、任务、多维表格
(4) 用户提到"飞书"、"云盘"、"云文档"、"飞书文档"

**核心原则**: Token 内存存储，用户隔离，Gateway 重启后需重新授权

resolvedSkills.name: find-skills
resolvedSkills.description: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.

resolvedSkills.name: memory-recall
resolvedSkills.description: 基于钩子（hooks）的记忆检索系统，允许通过关键词触发快速回忆相关记忆。全局记忆技能。

resolvedSkills.name: memory-truncation
resolvedSkills.description: Memory 硬截断保护技能。防止 MEMORY.md 文件溢出导致 token 超限，确保 Memory 系统稳定运行。全局技能。

resolvedSkills.name: qqbot-channel
resolvedSkills.description: QQ 频道管理技能。查询频道列表、子频道、成员、发帖、公告、日程等操作。使用 qqbot_channel_api 工具代理 QQ 开放平台 HTTP 接口，自动处理 Token 鉴权。当用户需要查看频道、管理子频道、查询成员、发布帖子/公告/日程时使用此技能。

resolvedSkills.name: qqbot-media
resolvedSkills.description: QQBot 富媒体收发能力。使用 <qqmedia> 标签，系统根据文件扩展名自动识别类型（图片/语音/视频/文件）。

resolvedSkills.name: qqbot-remind
resolvedSkills.description: QQBot 定时提醒。支持一次性和周期性提醒的创建、查询、取消。当通过 QQ 通道通信且涉及提醒/定时任务时使用。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-bitable
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书多维表格（Bitable）的创建、查询、编辑和管理工具。包含 27 种字段类型支持、高级筛选、批量操作和视图管理。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要创建或管理飞书多维表格 App
(2) 需要在多维表格中新增、查询、修改、删除记录（行数据）
(3) 需要管理字段（列）、视图、数据表
(4) 用户提到"多维表格"、"bitable"、"数据表"、"记录"、"字段"
(5) 需要批量导入数据或批量更新多维表格

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-calendar
resolvedSkills.description: 飞书日历与日程管理工具集。包含日历管理、日程管理、参会人管理、忙闲查询。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-channel-rules
resolvedSkills.description: Lark/Feishu channel output rules. Always active in Lark conversations.

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-create-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 创建飞书云文档。从 Lark-flavored Markdown 内容创建新的飞书云文档，支持指定创建位置（文件夹/知识库/知识空间）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-fetch-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 获取飞书云文档内容。返回文档的 Markdown 内容，支持处理文档中的图片、文件和画板（需配合 feishu_doc_media 工具）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-im-read
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书 IM 消息读取工具使用指南，覆盖会话消息获取、话题回复读取、跨会话消息搜索、图片/文件资源下载。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要获取群聊或单聊的历史消息
(2) 需要读取话题（thread）内的回复消息
(3) 需要跨会话搜索消息（按关键词、发送者、时间等条件）
(4) 消息中包含图片、文件、音频、视频，需要下载
(5) 用户提到"聊天记录"、"消息"、"群里说了什么"、"话题回复"、"搜索消息"、"图片"、"文件下载"
(6) 需要按时间范围过滤消息、分页获取更多消息

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-task
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书任务管理工具,用于创建、查询、更新任务和清单。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要创建、查询、更新任务
(2) 需要创建、管理任务清单
(3) 需要查看任务列表或清单内的任务
(4) 用户提到"任务"、"待办"、"to-do"、"清单"、"task"
(5) 需要设置任务负责人、关注人、截止时间

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-troubleshoot
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书插件问题排查工具。包含常见问题 FAQ 和深度诊断命令（/feishu_doctor）。

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-update-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 更新飞书云文档。支持 7 种更新模式：追加、覆盖、定位替换、全文替换、前/后插入、删除。

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".

resolvedSkills.name: tmux
resolvedSkills.description: Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.

resolvedSkills.name: weather
resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: claude-code-architecture
resolvedSkills.description: Claude Code 架构优化技能。基于 Claude Code 泄露源码的深度分析，提取核心架构设计模式和最佳实践，用于优化 OpenClaw 系统。全局技能。

resolvedSkills.name: clawsec-suite
resolvedSkills.description: ClawSec 安全套件 - 恶意技能监控、加密签名验证、审批门控响应。全局安全技能。

resolvedSkills.name: context-engineering
resolvedSkills.description: AI Agent 上下文工程技能。当需要管理 AI Agent 的上下文状态、优化 Token 使用、设计多 Agent 协作、处理长周期任务时使用此技能。基于 Anthropic 最佳实践。全局技能。

resolvedSkills.name: core-principles
resolvedSkills.description: 核心原则技能 - 隐私保护 + 实事求是。全局最高优先级，所有 Session 和 Agent 必须遵守。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-global-operations
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书全局操作技能（最高优先级）。包含 Token 内存存储机制、云盘操作、文档创建等核心功能。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要操作飞书云盘（创建文件夹/上传下载文件）
(2) 需要创建/编辑/读取飞书云文档
(3) 需要管理飞书日历、任务、多维表格
(4) 用户提到"飞书"、"云盘"、"云文档"、"飞书文档"

**核心原则**: Token 内存存储，用户隔离，Gateway 重启后需重新授权

resolvedSkills.name: qqbot-channel
resolvedSkills.description: QQ 频道管理技能。查询频道列表、子频道、成员、发帖、公告、日程等操作。使用 qqbot_channel_api 工具代理 QQ 开放平台 HTTP 接口，自动处理 Token 鉴权。当用户需要查看频道、管理子频道、查询成员、发布帖子/公告/日程时使用此技能。

resolvedSkills.name: qqbot-media
resolvedSkills.description: QQBot 富媒体收发能力。使用 <qqmedia> 标签，系统根据文件扩展名自动识别类型（图片/语音/视频/文件）。

resolvedSkills.name: qqbot-remind
resolvedSkills.description: QQBot 定时提醒。支持一次性和周期性提醒的创建、查询、取消。当通过 QQ 通道通信且涉及提醒/定时任务时使用。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-bitable
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书多维表格（Bitable）的创建、查询、编辑和管理工具。包含 27 种字段类型支持、高级筛选、批量操作和视图管理。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要创建或管理飞书多维表格 App
(2) 需要在多维表格中新增、查询、修改、删除记录（行数据）
(3) 需要管理字段（列）、视图、数据表
(4) 用户提到"多维表格"、"bitable"、"数据表"、"记录"、"字段"
(5) 需要批量导入数据或批量更新多维表格

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-calendar
resolvedSkills.description: 飞书日历与日程管理工具集。包含日历管理、日程管理、参会人管理、忙闲查询。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-channel-rules
resolvedSkills.description: Lark/Feishu channel output rules. Always active in Lark conversations.

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-create-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 创建飞书云文档。从 Lark-flavored Markdown 内容创建新的飞书云文档，支持指定创建位置（文件夹/知识库/知识空间）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-fetch-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 获取飞书云文档内容。返回文档的 Markdown 内容，支持处理文档中的图片、文件和画板（需配合 feishu_doc_media 工具）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-im-read
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书 IM 消息读取工具使用指南，覆盖会话消息获取、话题回复读取、跨会话消息搜索、图片/文件资源下载。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要获取群聊或单聊的历史消息
(2) 需要读取话题（thread）内的回复消息
(3) 需要跨会话搜索消息（按关键词、发送者、时间等条件）
(4) 消息中包含图片、文件、音频、视频，需要下载
(5) 用户提到"聊天记录"、"消息"、"群里说了什么"、"话题回复"、"搜索消息"、"图片"、"文件下载"
(6) 需要按时间范围过滤消息、分页获取更多消息

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-task
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书任务管理工具,用于创建、查询、更新任务和清单。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要创建、查询、更新任务
(2) 需要创建、管理任务清单
(3) 需要查看任务列表或清单内的任务
(4) 用户提到"任务"、"待办"、"to-do"、"清单"、"task"
(5) 需要设置任务负责人、关注人、截止时间

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-troubleshoot
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书插件问题排查工具。包含常见问题 FAQ 和深度诊断命令（/feishu_doctor）。

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-update-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 更新飞书云文档。支持 7 种更新模式：追加、覆盖、定位替换、全文替换、前/后插入、删除。

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".

resolvedSkills.name: tmux
resolvedSkills.description: Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.

resolvedSkills.name: weather
resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: qqbot-remind
resolvedSkills.description: QQBot 定时提醒。支持一次性和周期性提醒的创建、查询、取消。当通过 QQ 通道通信且涉及提醒/定时任务时使用。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-bitable
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书多维表格（Bitable）的创建、查询、编辑和管理工具。包含 27 种字段类型支持、高级筛选、批量操作和视图管理。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要创建或管理飞书多维表格 App
(2) 需要在多维表格中新增、查询、修改、删除记录（行数据）
(3) 需要管理字段（列）、视图、数据表
(4) 用户提到"多维表格"、"bitable"、"数据表"、"记录"、"字段"
(5) 需要批量导入数据或批量更新多维表格

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-calendar
resolvedSkills.description: 飞书日历与日程管理工具集。包含日历管理、日程管理、参会人管理、忙闲查询。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-channel-rules
resolvedSkills.description: Lark/Feishu channel output rules. Always active in Lark conversations.

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-create-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 创建飞书云文档。从 Lark-flavored Markdown 内容创建新的飞书云文档，支持指定创建位置（文件夹/知识库/知识空间）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-fetch-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 获取飞书云文档内容。返回文档的 Markdown 内容，支持处理文档中的图片、文件和画板（需配合 feishu_doc_media 工具）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-im-read
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书 IM 消息读取工具使用指南，覆盖会话消息获取、话题回复读取、跨会话消息搜索、图片/文件资源下载。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要获取群聊或单聊的历史消息
(2) 需要读取话题（thread）内的回复消息
(3) 需要跨会话搜索消息（按关键词、发送者、时间等条件）
(4) 消息中包含图片、文件、音频、视频，需要下载
(5) 用户提到"聊天记录"、"消息"、"群里说了什么"、"话题回复"、"搜索消息"、"图片"、"文件下载"
(6) 需要按时间范围过滤消息、分页获取更多消息

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-task
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书任务管理工具,用于创建、查询、更新任务和清单。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要创建、查询、更新任务
(2) 需要创建、管理任务清单
(3) 需要查看任务列表或清单内的任务
(4) 用户提到"任务"、"待办"、"to-do"、"清单"、"task"
(5) 需要设置任务负责人、关注人、截止时间

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-troubleshoot
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书插件问题排查工具。包含常见问题 FAQ 和深度诊断命令（/feishu_doctor）。

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-update-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 更新飞书云文档。支持 7 种更新模式：追加、覆盖、定位替换、全文替换、前/后插入、删除。

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: qqbot-channel
resolvedSkills.description: QQ 频道管理技能。查询频道列表、子频道、成员、发帖、公告、日程等操作。使用 qqbot_channel_api 工具代理 QQ 开放平台 HTTP 接口，自动处理 Token 鉴权。当用户需要查看频道、管理子频道、查询成员、发布帖子/公告/日程时使用此技能。

resolvedSkills.name: qqbot-media
resolvedSkills.description: QQBot 富媒体收发能力。使用 <qqmedia> 标签，系统根据文件扩展名自动识别类型（图片/语音/视频/文件）。

resolvedSkills.name: qqbot-remind
resolvedSkills.description: QQBot 定时提醒。支持一次性和周期性提醒的创建、查询、取消。当通过 QQ 通道通信且涉及提醒/定时任务时使用。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-bitable
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书多维表格（Bitable）的创建、查询、编辑和管理工具。包含 27 种字段类型支持、高级筛选、批量操作和视图管理。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要创建或管理飞书多维表格 App
(2) 需要在多维表格中新增、查询、修改、删除记录（行数据）
(3) 需要管理字段（列）、视图、数据表
(4) 用户提到"多维表格"、"bitable"、"数据表"、"记录"、"字段"
(5) 需要批量导入数据或批量更新多维表格

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-calendar
resolvedSkills.description: 飞书日历与日程管理工具集。包含日历管理、日程管理、参会人管理、忙闲查询。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-channel-rules
resolvedSkills.description: Lark/Feishu channel output rules. Always active in Lark conversations.

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-create-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 创建飞书云文档。从 Lark-flavored Markdown 内容创建新的飞书云文档，支持指定创建位置（文件夹/知识库/知识空间）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-fetch-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 获取飞书云文档内容。返回文档的 Markdown 内容，支持处理文档中的图片、文件和画板（需配合 feishu_doc_media 工具）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-im-read
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书 IM 消息读取工具使用指南，覆盖会话消息获取、话题回复读取、跨会话消息搜索、图片/文件资源下载。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要获取群聊或单聊的历史消息
(2) 需要读取话题（thread）内的回复消息
(3) 需要跨会话搜索消息（按关键词、发送者、时间等条件）
(4) 消息中包含图片、文件、音频、视频，需要下载
(5) 用户提到"聊天记录"、"消息"、"群里说了什么"、"话题回复"、"搜索消息"、"图片"、"文件下载"
(6) 需要按时间范围过滤消息、分页获取更多消息

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-task
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书任务管理工具,用于创建、查询、更新任务和清单。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要创建、查询、更新任务
(2) 需要创建、管理任务清单
(3) 需要查看任务列表或清单内的任务
(4) 用户提到"任务"、"待办"、"to-do"、"清单"、"task"
(5) 需要设置任务负责人、关注人、截止时间

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-troubleshoot
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书插件问题排查工具。包含常见问题 FAQ 和深度诊断命令（/feishu_doctor）。

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-update-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 更新飞书云文档。支持 7 种更新模式：追加、覆盖、定位替换、全文替换、前/后插入、删除。

agent:main:cron:7eb7d21f-b3fe-443a-9d6d-.lastHeartbeatText:
我已经为您生成了最新的市场分析报告（12:00午盘数据）。以下是核心要点：

---

## 📊 **今日市场核心数据**（截至午盘11:30）

### **一、大盘表现**
- **上证指数**：3991.14点 ⬆️ **+0.63%**（盘中重返4000点！）
- **深证成指**：14239.89点 ⬆️ **+1.74%**
- **创业板指**：3410.39点 ⬆️ **+2.62%**（创2021年12月以来新高）
- **两市成交**：15032亿元（半日）

### **二、市场情绪**
- ✅ 上涨：**4425家**（占比82%）
- ❌ 下跌：970家
- 🔥 涨停：62只
- 💰 新开户：3月460万户，环比+82.38%

### **三、热点板块**
**领涨**：玻璃玻纤、电池、3D摄像头、券商、CRO  
**领跌**：贵金属、航运港口、光纤概念

### **四、重要消息**
- 🌍 **美伊关系**：特朗普表示协议"非常乐观"，地缘风险下降
- 📊 **经济数据**：3月CPI同比+1.0%，PPI同比+0.5%（41个月首涨）
- 🤖 **机器人**：2026年产量预计年增94%，产业化加速

---

**💡 核心建议**：中高仓位（70-80%），关注科技成长、新能源、券商板块，沪指4000点关口可能震荡，不宜追高。

完整报告已在上方详细列出，如需特定股票的实时走势或深度分析，请告诉我！📈

agent:main:cron:7eb7d21f-b3fe-443a-9d6d-.lastHeartbeatText:
我已经为您生成了最新的市场分析报告（12:00午盘数据）。以下是核心要点：

---

## 📊 **今日市场核心数据**（截至午盘11:30）

### **一、大盘表现**
- **上证指数**：3991.14点 ⬆️ **+0.63%**（盘中重返4000点！）
- **深证成指**：14239.89点 ⬆️ **+1.74%**
- **创业板指**：3410.39点 ⬆️ **+2.62%**（创2021年12月以来新高）
- **两市成交**：15032亿元（半日）

### **二、市场情绪**
- ✅ 上涨：**4425家**（占比82%）
- ❌ 下跌：970家
- 🔥 涨停：62只
- 💰 新开户：3月460万户，环比+82.38%

### **三、热点板块**
**领涨**：玻璃玻纤、电池、3D摄像头、券商、CRO  
**领跌**：贵金属、航运港口、光纤概念

### **四、重要消息**
- 🌍 **美伊关系**：特朗普表示协议"非常乐观"，地缘风险下降
- 📊 **经济数据**：3月CPI同比+1.0%，PPI同比+0.5%（41个月首涨）
- 🤖 **机器人**：2026年产量预计年增94%，产业化加速

---

**💡 核心建议**：中高仓位（70-80%），关注科技成长、新能源、券商板块，沪指4000点关口可能震荡，不宜追高。

完整报告已在上方详细列出，如需特定股票的实时走势或深度分析，请告诉我！📈

Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".

resolvedSkills.name: tmux
resolvedSkills.description: Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.

resolvedSkills.name: weather
resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: clawsec-suite
resolvedSkills.description: ClawSec 安全套件 - 恶意技能监控、加密签名验证、审批门控响应。全局安全技能。

resolvedSkills.name: context-engineering
resolvedSkills.description: AI Agent 上下文工程技能。当需要管理 AI Agent 的上下文状态、优化 Token 使用、设计多 Agent 协作、处理长周期任务时使用此技能。基于 Anthropic 最佳实践。

resolvedSkills.name: core-principles
resolvedSkills.description: 核心原则技能 - 隐私保护 + 实事求是。全局最高优先级，所有 Session 和 Agent 必须遵守。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-global-operations
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书全局操作技能（最高优先级）。包含 Token 内存存储机制、云盘操作、文档创建等核心功能。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要操作飞书云盘（创建文件夹/上传下载文件）
(2) 需要创建/编辑/读取飞书云文档
(3) 需要管理飞书日历、任务、多维表格
(4) 用户提到"飞书"、"云盘"、"云文档"、"飞书文档"

**核心原则**: Token 内存存储，用户隔离，Gateway 重启后需重新授权

resolvedSkills.name: find-skills
resolvedSkills.description: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.

resolvedSkills.name: memory-recall
resolvedSkills.description: 基于钩子（hooks）的记忆检索系统，允许通过关键词触发快速回忆相关记忆。全局记忆技能。

resolvedSkills.name: multi-search-engine
resolvedSkills.description: 17 个搜索引擎集成，无需 API key 即可进行网络搜索。支持国内 8 个引擎和国际 9 个引擎，内置自动代理访问国外网站。

resolvedSkills.name: opencode-integration
resolvedSkills.description: OpenCode 集成技能。使用 OpenCode 进行代码生成、项目管理和 AI 编码任务。支持 Plan/Build 工作流、会话管理、模型选择。

resolvedSkills.name: self-evolution
resolvedSkills.description: 自我进化技能，用于 AI 助手的持续学习和能力提升。利用外网访问优势，学习最新技术，增强现有能力，创建新技能。全局进化技能。

resolvedSkills.name: self-improving
resolvedSkills.description: Self-Improving + Proactive Agent — Global Skill. 从用户纠正和自我反思中学习，知识随时间累积，桥接原生记忆系统。

resolvedSkills.name: automation-workflow
resolvedSkills.description: 自动化工作流技能，用于创建和管理自动化任务流程。

---

## 📊 股票分析师报告已生成

**报告已保存到**: `memory/stock-report-2026-04-10-15-00.md`

### ⚠️ 发送问题

无法将报告发送到QQ，原因：
- 定时任务的 `chat_id` 为 "heartbeat"（心跳会话）
- 有效QQ目标格式应为：`qqbot:c2c:openid`（私聊）或 `qqbot:group:groupid`（群聊）

### 📈 今日市场亮点

| 指数 | 点位 | 涨幅 |
|------|------|------|
| 上证指数 | **3986.22** | +0.51% |
| 创业板指 | **3448.79** | **+3.78%** ⭐ |
| 深证成指 | **14309.47** | +2.24% |

**成交额**：沪深两市突破 **2万亿元**（连续第3日）

### 🔑 重要事件

1. **PPI结束41个月下降** - 同比上涨0.5%，工业通胀修复
2. **四部门"反内卷"政策** - 锂电储能板块大涨
3. **中东局势反复** - 美伊停火首日生变，霍尔木兹海峡再关闭
4. **美联储主席更替** - 沃什听证会推迟

### 🚀 今日热点

- **宁德时代**：成交额超200亿，涨5.9%
- **锂电储能**：欣旺达盘中+20%，国轩高科涨停
- **券商股**：港股国泰君安国际+26%

---

需要我通过**飞书**发送这份报告给南哥吗？或者请提供正确的QQ目标地址。

会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-update-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 更新飞书云文档。支持 7 种更新模式：追加、覆盖、定位替换、全文替换、前/后插入、删除。

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".

resolvedSkills.name: tmux
resolvedSkills.description: Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.

resolvedSkills.name: weather
resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: clawsec-suite
resolvedSkills.description: ClawSec 安全套件 - 恶意技能监控、加密签名验证、审批门控响应。全局安全技能。

resolvedSkills.name: context-engineering
resolvedSkills.description: AI Agent 上下文工程技能。当需要管理 AI Agent 的上下文状态、优化 Token 使用、设计多 Agent 协作、处理长周期任务时使用此技能。基于 Anthropic 最佳实践。

resolvedSkills.name: core-principles
resolvedSkills.description: 核心原则技能 - 隐私保护 + 实事求是。全局最高优先级，所有 Session 和 Agent 必须遵守。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-global-operations
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书全局操作技能（最高优先级）。包含 Token 内存存储机制、云盘操作、文档创建等核心功能。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要操作飞书云盘（创建文件夹/上传下载文件）
(2) 需要创建/编辑/读取飞书云文档
(3) 需要管理飞书日历、任务、多维表格
(4) 用户提到"飞书"、"云盘"、"云文档"、"飞书文档"

**核心原则**: Token 内存存储，用户隔离，Gateway 重启后需重新授权

resolvedSkills.name: find-skills
resolvedSkills.description: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.

resolvedSkills.name: memory-recall
resolvedSkills.description: 基于钩子（hooks）的记忆检索系统，允许通过关键词触发快速回忆相关记忆。全局记忆技能。

resolvedSkills.name: multi-search-engine
resolvedSkills.description: 17 个搜索引擎集成，无需 API key 即可进行网络搜索。支持国内 8 个引擎和国际 9 个引擎，内置自动代理访问国外网站。

resolvedSkills.name: opencode-integration
resolvedSkills.description: OpenCode 集成技能。使用 OpenCode 进行代码生成、项目管理和 AI 编码任务。支持 Plan/Build 工作流、会话管理、模型选择。

resolvedSkills.name: self-evolution
resolvedSkills.description: 自我进化技能，用于 AI 助手的持续学习和能力提升。利用外网访问优势，学习最新技术，增强现有能力，创建新技能。全局进化技能。

resolvedSkills.name: self-improving
resolvedSkills.description: Self-Improving + Proactive Agent — Global Skill. 从用户纠正和自我反思中学习，知识随时间累积，桥接原生记忆系统。

resolvedSkills.name: automation-workflow
resolvedSkills.description: 自动化工作流技能，用于创建和管理自动化任务流程。

## 📊 股票分析师报告已生成

**报告已保存到**: `memory/stock-report-2026-04-10-15-00.md`

### ⚠️ 发送问题

无法将报告发送到QQ，原因：
- 定时任务的 `chat_id` 为 "heartbeat"（心跳会话）
- 有效QQ目标格式应为：`qqbot:c2c:openid`（私聊）或 `qqbot:group:groupid`（群聊）

### 📈 今日市场亮点

| 指数 | 点位 | 涨幅 |
|------|------|------|
| 上证指数 | **3986.22** | +0.51% |
| 创业板指 | **3448.79** | **+3.78%** ⭐ |
| 深证成指 | **14309.47** | +2.24% |

**成交额**：沪深两市突破 **2万亿元**（连续第3日）

### 🔑 重要事件

1. **PPI结束41个月下降** - 同比上涨0.5%，工业通胀修复
2. **四部门"反内卷"政策** - 锂电储能板块大涨
3. **中东局势反复** - 美伊停火首日生变，霍尔木兹海峡再关闭
4. **美联储主席更替** - 沃什听证会推迟

### 🚀 今日热点

- **宁德时代**：成交额超200亿，涨5.9%
- **锂电储能**：欣旺达盘中+20%，国轩高科涨停
- **券商股**：港股国泰君安国际+26%

---

(5) 用户提到"聊天记录"、"消息"、"群里说了什么"、"话题回复"、"搜索消息"、"图片"、"文件下载"
(6) 需要按时间范围过滤消息、分页获取更多消息

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-task
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书任务管理工具,用于创建、查询、更新任务和清单。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要创建、查询、更新任务
(2) 需要创建、管理任务清单
(3) 需要查看任务列表或清单内的任务
(4) 用户提到"任务"、"待办"、"to-do"、"清单"、"task"
(5) 需要设置任务负责人、关注人、截止时间

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-troubleshoot
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书插件问题排查工具。包含常见问题 FAQ 和深度诊断命令（/feishu_doctor）。

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-update-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 更新飞书云文档。支持 7 种更新模式：追加、覆盖、定位替换、全文替换、前/后插入、删除。

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".

resolvedSkills.name: tmux
resolvedSkills.description: Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.

resolvedSkills.name: weather
resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: clawsec-suite
resolvedSkills.description: ClawSec 安全套件 - 恶意技能监控、加密签名验证、审批门控响应。全局安全技能。

resolvedSkills.name: context-engineering
resolvedSkills.description: AI Agent 上下文工程技能。当需要管理 AI Agent 的上下文状态、优化 Token 使用、设计多 Agent 协作、处理长周期任务时使用此技能。基于 Anthropic 最佳实践。

resolvedSkills.name: core-principles
resolvedSkills.description: 核心原则技能 - 隐私保护 + 实事求是。全局最高优先级，所有 Session 和 Agent 必须遵守。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-global-operations
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书全局操作技能（最高优先级）。包含 Token 内存存储机制、云盘操作、文档创建等核心功能。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要操作飞书云盘（创建文件夹/上传下载文件）
(2) 需要创建/编辑/读取飞书云文档
(3) 需要管理飞书日历、任务、多维表格
(4) 用户提到"飞书"、"云盘"、"云文档"、"飞书文档"

**核心原则**: Token 内存存储，用户隔离，Gateway 重启后需重新授权

resolvedSkills.name: find-skills
resolvedSkills.description: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.

resolvedSkills.name: memory-recall
resolvedSkills.description: 基于钩子（hooks）的记忆检索系统，允许通过关键词触发快速回忆相关记忆。全局记忆技能。

resolvedSkills.name: multi-search-engine
resolvedSkills.description: 17 个搜索引擎集成，无需 API key 即可进行网络搜索。支持国内 8 个引擎和国际 9 个引擎，内置自动代理访问国外网站。

resolvedSkills.name: opencode-integration
resolvedSkills.description: OpenCode 集成技能。使用 OpenCode 进行代码生成、项目管理和 AI 编码任务。支持 Plan/Build 工作流、会话管理、模型选择。

resolvedSkills.name: self-evolution
resolvedSkills.description: 自我进化技能，用于 AI 助手的持续学习和能力提升。利用外网访问优势，学习最新技术，增强现有能力，创建新技能。全局进化技能。

resolvedSkills.name: self-improving
resolvedSkills.description: Self-Improving + Proactive Agent — Global Skill. 从用户纠正和自我反思中学习，知识随时间累积，桥接原生记忆系统。

resolvedSkills.name: automation-workflow
resolvedSkills.description: 自动化工作流技能，用于创建和管理自动化任务流程。

## 📊 股票分析师报告已生成

**报告已保存到**: `memory/stock-report-2026-04-10-15-00.md`

### ⚠️ 发送问题

无法将报告发送到QQ，原因：
- 定时任务的 `chat_id` 为 "heartbeat"（心跳会话）
- 有效QQ目标格式应为：`qqbot:c2c:openid`（私聊）或 `qqbot:group:groupid`（群聊）

### 📈 今日市场亮点

| 指数 | 点位 | 涨幅 |
|------|------|------|
| 上证指数 | **3986.22** | +0.51% |
| 创业板指 | **3448.79** | **+3.78%** ⭐ |
| 深证成指 | **14309.47** | +2.24% |

**成交额**：沪深两市突破 **2万亿元**（连续第3日）

### 🔑 重要事件

1. **PPI结束41个月下降** - 同比上涨0.5%，工业通胀修复
2. **四部门"反内卷"政策** - 锂电储能板块大涨
3. **中东局势反复** - 美伊停火首日生变，霍尔木兹海峡再关闭
4. **美联储主席更替** - 沃什听证会推迟

### 🚀 今日热点

- **宁德时代**：成交额超200亿，涨5.9%
- **锂电储能**：欣旺达盘中+20%，国轩高科涨停
- **券商股**：港股国泰君安国际+26%

---

resolvedSkills.description: 创建飞书云文档。从 Lark-flavored Markdown 内容创建新的飞书云文档，支持指定创建位置（文件夹/知识库/知识空间）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-fetch-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 获取飞书云文档内容。返回文档的 Markdown 内容，支持处理文档中的图片、文件和画板（需配合 feishu_doc_media 工具）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-im-read
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书 IM 消息读取工具使用指南，覆盖会话消息获取、话题回复读取、跨会话消息搜索、图片/文件资源下载。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要获取群聊或单聊的历史消息
(2) 需要读取话题（thread）内的回复消息
(3) 需要跨会话搜索消息（按关键词、发送者、时间等条件）
(4) 消息中包含图片、文件、音频、视频，需要下载
(5) 用户提到"聊天记录"、"消息"、"群里说了什么"、"话题回复"、"搜索消息"、"图片"、"文件下载"
(6) 需要按时间范围过滤消息、分页获取更多消息

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-task
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书任务管理工具,用于创建、查询、更新任务和清单。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要创建、查询、更新任务
(2) 需要创建、管理任务清单
(3) 需要查看任务列表或清单内的任务
(4) 用户提到"任务"、"待办"、"to-do"、"清单"、"task"
(5) 需要设置任务负责人、关注人、截止时间

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-troubleshoot
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书插件问题排查工具。包含常见问题 FAQ 和深度诊断命令（/feishu_doctor）。

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-update-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 更新飞书云文档。支持 7 种更新模式：追加、覆盖、定位替换、全文替换、前/后插入、删除。

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".

resolvedSkills.name: tmux
resolvedSkills.description: Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.

resolvedSkills.name: weather
resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: clawsec-suite
resolvedSkills.description: ClawSec 安全套件 - 恶意技能监控、加密签名验证、审批门控响应。全局安全技能。

resolvedSkills.name: context-engineering
resolvedSkills.description: AI Agent 上下文工程技能。当需要管理 AI Agent 的上下文状态、优化 Token 使用、设计多 Agent 协作、处理长周期任务时使用此技能。基于 Anthropic 最佳实践。

resolvedSkills.name: core-principles
resolvedSkills.description: 核心原则技能 - 隐私保护 + 实事求是。全局最高优先级，所有 Session 和 Agent 必须遵守。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-global-operations
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书全局操作技能（最高优先级）。包含 Token 内存存储机制、云盘操作、文档创建等核心功能。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要操作飞书云盘（创建文件夹/上传下载文件）
(2) 需要创建/编辑/读取飞书云文档
(3) 需要管理飞书日历、任务、多维表格
(4) 用户提到"飞书"、"云盘"、"云文档"、"飞书文档"

**核心原则**: Token 内存存储，用户隔离，Gateway 重启后需重新授权

resolvedSkills.name: find-skills
resolvedSkills.description: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.

resolvedSkills.name: memory-recall
resolvedSkills.description: 基于钩子（hooks）的记忆检索系统，允许通过关键词触发快速回忆相关记忆。全局记忆技能。

resolvedSkills.name: multi-search-engine
resolvedSkills.description: 17 个搜索引擎集成，无需 API key 即可进行网络搜索。支持国内 8 个引擎和国际 9 个引擎，内置自动代理访问国外网站。

resolvedSkills.name: opencode-integration
resolvedSkills.description: OpenCode 集成技能。使用 OpenCode 进行代码生成、项目管理和 AI 编码任务。支持 Plan/Build 工作流、会话管理、模型选择。

resolvedSkills.name: self-evolution
resolvedSkills.description: 自我进化技能，用于 AI 助手的持续学习和能力提升。利用外网访问优势，学习最新技术，增强现有能力，创建新技能。全局进化技能。

resolvedSkills.name: self-improving
resolvedSkills.description: Self-Improving + Proactive Agent — Global Skill. 从用户纠正和自我反思中学习，知识随时间累积，桥接原生记忆系统。

resolvedSkills.name: automation-workflow
resolvedSkills.description: 自动化工作流技能，用于创建和管理自动化任务流程。

## 📊 股票分析师报告已生成

**报告已保存到**: `memory/stock-report-2026-04-10-15-00.md`

### ⚠️ 发送问题

无法将报告发送到QQ，原因：
- 定时任务的 `chat_id` 为 "heartbeat"（心跳会话）
- 有效QQ目标格式应为：`qqbot:c2c:openid`（私聊）或 `qqbot:group:groupid`（群聊）

### 📈 今日市场亮点

| 指数 | 点位 | 涨幅 |
|------|------|------|
| 上证指数 | **3986.22** | +0.51% |
| 创业板指 | **3448.79** | **+3.78%** ⭐ |
| 深证成指 | **14309.47** | +2.24% |

**成交额**：沪深两市突破 **2万亿元**（连续第3日）

### 🔑 重要事件

1. **PPI结束41个月下降** - 同比上涨0.5%，工业通胀修复
2. **四部门"反内卷"政策** - 锂电储能板块大涨
3. **中东局势反复** - 美伊停火首日生变，霍尔木兹海峡再关闭
4. **美联储主席更替** - 沃什听证会推迟

### 🚀 今日热点

- **宁德时代**：成交额超200亿，涨5.9%
- **锂电储能**：欣旺达盘中+20%，国轩高科涨停
- **券商股**：港股国泰君安国际+26%

---

需要我通过**飞书**发送这份报告给南哥吗？或者请提供正确的QQ目标地址。

飞书多维表格（Bitable）的创建、查询、编辑和管理工具。包含 27 种字段类型支持、高级筛选、批量操作和视图管理。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要创建或管理飞书多维表格 App
(2) 需要在多维表格中新增、查询、修改、删除记录（行数据）
(3) 需要管理字段（列）、视图、数据表
(4) 用户提到"多维表格"、"bitable"、"数据表"、"记录"、"字段"
(5) 需要批量导入数据或批量更新多维表格

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-calendar
resolvedSkills.description: 飞书日历与日程管理工具集。包含日历管理、日程管理、参会人管理、忙闲查询。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-channel-rules
resolvedSkills.description: Lark/Feishu channel output rules. Always active in Lark conversations.

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-create-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 创建飞书云文档。从 Lark-flavored Markdown 内容创建新的飞书云文档，支持指定创建位置（文件夹/知识库/知识空间）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-fetch-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 获取飞书云文档内容。返回文档的 Markdown 内容，支持处理文档中的图片、文件和画板（需配合 feishu_doc_media 工具）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-im-read
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书 IM 消息读取工具使用指南，覆盖会话消息获取、话题回复读取、跨会话消息搜索、图片/文件资源下载。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要获取群聊或单聊的历史消息
(2) 需要读取话题（thread）内的回复消息
(3) 需要跨会话搜索消息（按关键词、发送者、时间等条件）
(4) 消息中包含图片、文件、音频、视频，需要下载
(5) 用户提到"聊天记录"、"消息"、"群里说了什么"、"话题回复"、"搜索消息"、"图片"、"文件下载"
(6) 需要按时间范围过滤消息、分页获取更多消息

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-task
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书任务管理工具,用于创建、查询、更新任务和清单。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要创建、查询、更新任务
(2) 需要创建、管理任务清单
(3) 需要查看任务列表或清单内的任务
(4) 用户提到"任务"、"待办"、"to-do"、"清单"、"task"
(5) 需要设置任务负责人、关注人、截止时间

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-troubleshoot
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书插件问题排查工具。包含常见问题 FAQ 和深度诊断命令（/feishu_doctor）。

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-update-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 更新飞书云文档。支持 7 种更新模式：追加、覆盖、定位替换、全文替换、前/后插入、删除。

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".

resolvedSkills.name: tmux
resolvedSkills.description: Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.

resolvedSkills.name: weather
resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: clawsec-suite
resolvedSkills.description: ClawSec 安全套件 - 恶意技能监控、加密签名验证、审批门控响应。全局安全技能。

resolvedSkills.name: context-engineering
resolvedSkills.description: AI Agent 上下文工程技能。当需要管理 AI Agent 的上下文状态、优化 Token 使用、设计多 Agent 协作、处理长周期任务时使用此技能。基于 Anthropic 最佳实践。

resolvedSkills.name: core-principles
resolvedSkills.description: 核心原则技能 - 隐私保护 + 实事求是。全局最高优先级，所有 Session 和 Agent 必须遵守。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-global-operations
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书全局操作技能（最高优先级）。包含 Token 内存存储机制、云盘操作、文档创建等核心功能。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要操作飞书云盘（创建文件夹/上传下载文件）
(2) 需要创建/编辑/读取飞书云文档
(3) 需要管理飞书日历、任务、多维表格
(4) 用户提到"飞书"、"云盘"、"云文档"、"飞书文档"

**核心原则**: Token 内存存储，用户隔离，Gateway 重启后需重新授权

resolvedSkills.name: find-skills
resolvedSkills.description: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.

resolvedSkills.name: memory-recall
resolvedSkills.description: 基于钩子（hooks）的记忆检索系统，允许通过关键词触发快速回忆相关记忆。全局记忆技能。

resolvedSkills.name: multi-search-engine
resolvedSkills.description: 17 个搜索引擎集成，无需 API key 即可进行网络搜索。支持国内 8 个引擎和国际 9 个引擎，内置自动代理访问国外网站。

resolvedSkills.name: opencode-integration
resolvedSkills.description: OpenCode 集成技能。使用 OpenCode 进行代码生成、项目管理和 AI 编码任务。支持 Plan/Build 工作流、会话管理、模型选择。

resolvedSkills.name: self-evolution
resolvedSkills.description: 自我进化技能，用于 AI 助手的持续学习和能力提升。利用外网访问优势，学习最新技术，增强现有能力，创建新技能。全局进化技能。

resolvedSkills.name: self-improving
resolvedSkills.description: Self-Improving + Proactive Agent — Global Skill. 从用户纠正和自我反思中学习，知识随时间累积，桥接原生记忆系统。

resolvedSkills.name: automation-workflow
resolvedSkills.description: 自动化工作流技能，用于创建和管理自动化任务流程。

agent:main:cron:7eb7d21f-b3fe-443a-9d6d-.lastHeartbeatText:
这是又一个定时提醒触发了。看起来这是一个每小时触发的提醒任务。我已经在8:00 PM生成了一份完整的股市分析报告。

由于这是同一个提醒任务在8分钟后再次触发，而且我已经提供了完整的分析报告，我应该告知用户这个情况，并询问是否需要：
1. 更新报告（如果有新的数据）
2. 取消这个每小时重复的提醒
3. 调整提醒频率

让我礼貌地回复用户。南哥，这是**QQ股票分析师的每小时市场汇总报告**提醒，刚刚在8:00 PM已经触发过一次，我已经为您生成了一份完整的A股市场分析报告 📊

由于这是**每小时重复**的提醒任务，8分钟后（8:08 PM）再次触发了。

---

## 🔔 提醒管理建议

您可以选择以下操作：

### 1️⃣ 取消重复提醒
如果您不需要每小时都收到报告，我可以帮您取消这个定时提醒：
```
qqbot_remind remove <job_id>
```

### 2️⃣ 调整提醒频率
- 改为**每日一次**（收盘后）
- 改为**每周一次**（周末汇总）
- 改为**特定时间**（如开盘前、收盘后）

### 3️⃣ 保持现状
继续每小时自动生成报告（但注意：市场收盘后（15:00后）到次日开盘前（9:30）数据不会有变化）

---

## 📋 已生成的报告

**8:00 PM 已生成的报告包含：**
- ✅ 大盘指数数据（上证、深证、创业板、沪深300）
- ✅ 国际形势（美伊谈判、美联储、油价、金价、美股）
- ✅ 国内政策（央行、证监会、创业板改革、自贸区）
- ✅ 板块涨跌分析（领涨/领跌TOP5）
- ✅ 重点行业表现（银行、能源、科技、消费）
- ✅ 市场情绪与资金流向
- ✅ 市场预判与投资建议

**数据来源：** 第一财经、东方财富网、同花顺、上海证券报

---

**您希望如何处理这个每小时提醒？** 需要我帮您：
- [ ] 取消提醒
- [ ] 改为每日一次
- [ ] 保持每小时提醒
- [ ] 其他设置

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".

**报告时间：2026年4月10日 21:04 | 数据来源：财联社、乐咕乐股、央行官网、发改委官网**

## 一、📈 大盘走势分析

## 二、🌍 国际形势动态

### 美联储政策
- **美国3月核心CPI略低于预期**，但能源价格涨幅创2005年以来最大
- **汽油价格涨幅创1967年有记录以来最高**，占CPI涨幅近四分之三
- **美联储戴利表态**：加息可能性低于降息或维持利率不变
- **"美联储传声筒"Nick Timiraos**：能源的连锁影响（机票、航运价格）可能还在后面

### 国际油价
- **WTI原油**：97.28美元/桶（-0.61%）
- **布伦特原油**：95.29美元/桶（-0.66%）

- **COMEX白银**：76.16美元/盎司（-0.36%）

### 中东局势
- **美伊谈判**：美国代表团前往巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡进行谈判，副总统万斯已登机
- **伊朗**：基本物资供应充足，至少可保障6个月；霍尔木兹海峡控制权确保物资运输

## 八、💡 投资建议和风险提示

### 仓位建议 💼
- **建议仓位**：6-7成（**中高仓位**）
- **操作风格**：积极把握结构性机会，重点关注科技成长

### 配置方向 📊
| 方向 | 建议比例 | 重点关注 |
|------|----------|----------|
| **科技成长** | 40% | AI、半导体、光通信 |
| **新能源** | 25% | 电力运营商、储能 |
| **消费复苏** | 20% | 白酒、家电 |
| **现金** | 15% | 灵活应对波动 |

### 个股推荐（基于基本面）⭐
- **台积电产业链**：受益AI需求爆发
- **光模块龙头**：Lumentum产能售罄，景气度高涨
- **新能源运营商**：南方电网新能源发电量创新高
- **AI算力租赁**：CoreWeave模式受认可

### 风险警示 🚨
1. 避免追高题材炒作个股，注意估值风险
2. 注意业绩暴雷风险，回避ST风险股
3. 控制单一板块仓位，分散配置
4. 关注外部市场波动，设置止损

### 操作策略 📝
- **短线**：关注热点轮动，快进快出，重点跟踪AI、新能源
- **中线**：布局景气度向上行业，持有优质成长龙头
- **长线**：精选核心资产，关注国产替代、新能源革命

---

## 📌 重要提示

> ⚠️ **免责声明**：本报告仅供参考，不构成投资建议。股市有风险，投资需谨慎。数据来源于财联社、乐咕乐股、央行官网、发改委官网等公开渠道，可能存在延迟或误差。

**📊 今日市场亮点**：
- ✅ 赚钱效应71.33%，上涨家数超3700家
- ✅ 新能源电力创历史新高，装机突破2.8亿千瓦
- ✅ 台积电销售额同比增长45%，AI需求爆发
- ✅ 光模块龙头Lumentum称周期至少持续5年

**数据来源**：财联社、乐咕乐股、中国人民银行、证监会、发改委  
**下次更新**：22:00

# 📊 股票市场分析报告
**报告时间：** 2026年4月10日 23:00 (周五)  
**分析师：** QQ 股票分析师

## 📈 一、大盘走势分析

### 主要指数表现

---

## 🌍 二、国际形势动态

### 地缘政治
- **中东局势**：持续关注伊朗核问题及地区冲突对油价的影响
- **俄乌局势**：能源供应链稳定性仍需关注

### 美联储政策
- **利率预期**：关注美联储最新利率决议及点阵图指引
- **美元走势**：美元指数波动影响外资流向

### 大宗商品
- **国际油价**：WTI/布伦特原油关注库存数据及地缘风险
- **国际金价**：避险需求支撑金价，关注美联储政策转向信号

### 海外市场
- **美股**：道琼斯、纳斯达克、标普500隔夜表现
- **欧股**：欧洲主要股指走势

---

## 📜 三、国内政策动态

### 货币政策
- **央行**：关注MLF操作、LPR报价及降准降息预期
- **流动性**：银行间市场资金面情况

### 财政政策
- **财政部**：专项债发行进度、财政支出力度
- **发改委**：产业政策支持方向、重大投资项目

### 监管政策
- **证监会**：IPO节奏、再融资政策、退市新规
- **重要会议**：关注政治局会议及重要政策窗口

---

## 🏭 四、板块涨跌情况

### 领涨板块 TOP5（待更新）
1. **板块A** - 涨幅：待更新 | 驱动因素：政策利好
2. **板块B** - 涨幅：待更新 | 驱动因素：业绩超预期
3. **板块C** - 涨幅：待更新 | 驱动因素：资金流入
4. **板块D** - 涨幅：待更新 | 驱动因素：行业景气
5. **板块E** - 涨幅：待更新 | 驱动因素：技术突破

### 领跌板块 TOP5（待更新）
1. **板块F** - 跌幅：待更新 | 原因：业绩不及预期
2. **板块G** - 跌幅：待更新 | 原因：政策收紧
3. **板块H** - 跌幅：待更新 | 原因：资金流出
4. **板块I** - 跌幅：待更新 | 原因：估值回调
5. **板块J** - 跌幅：待更新 | 原因：外部冲击

---

## 💼 五、重点股票/行业表现

### 跟踪股票
| 股票代码 | 股票名称 | 最新价 | 涨跌幅 | 操作建议 |
|----------|----------|--------|--------|----------|
| 300755 | 华致酒行 | 待更新 | 待更新 | 关注白酒板块景气度 |
| 603027 | 千禾味业 | 待更新 | 待更新 | 关注调味品消费复苏 |
| 603288 | 海天味业 | 待更新 | 待更新 | 行业龙头，长期关注 |

### 行业表现
- **银行**：关注国有大行及股份行的资产质量与息差
- **能源**：石油、煤炭、新能源板块分化
- **农业**：种业、养殖、农产品关注季节性因素
- **消费**：白酒、家电、食品饮料关注消费复苏
- **科技**：半导体、AI、消费电子关注产业周期

---

## 💰 六、市场情绪和资金流向

### 资金流向
- **北向资金**：净流入/流出额、连续天数（待更新）
- **主力资金**：板块净流入/流出情况

### 市场情绪
- **成交量**：两市成交额及变化
- **涨跌家数**：上涨/下跌/涨停/跌停家数
- **情绪指标**：恐慌/贪婪指数

---

## 🔮 七、市场预判和预期

### 短期走势（1-3天）
- **预判**：震荡整理，关注关键点位突破
- **关键点位**：支撑位/压力位待更新

### 中期趋势（1-4周）
- **展望**：结构性行情为主，关注政策催化
- **机会方向**：政策受益板块、业绩确定性标的

### 风险因素
- 外部市场波动
- 地缘政治风险
- 政策不及预期

---

## 💡 八、投资建议和风险提示

### 仓位建议
- **建议仓位**：中等仓位（50%-70%）
- **配置方向**：均衡配置，关注政策受益板块

### 操作策略
- **短线**：快进快出，严格止损
- **中线**：关注业绩确定性，逢低布局
- **长线**：优选行业龙头，耐心持有

### 风险警示
⚠️ 市场有风险，投资需谨慎。本报告仅供参考，不构成投资建议。

---

## 📌 数据来源说明

由于技术限制，本次报告无法获取实时数据。建议通过以下渠道获取最新行情：
1. **新浪财经**：https://finance.sina.com.cn
2. **东方财富网**：https://www.eastmoney.com
3. **同花顺**：https://www.10jqka.com.cn
4. **Wind资讯**：专业金融数据终端

---

**报告完成时间：** 2026年4月10日 23:00

> 💡 **提示**：如需获取实时数据，请确保浏览器工具正常运行，或手动查询上述推荐的数据源。
